summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VXN (CBOE Nasdaq-100 Volatility Index) feature integration alongside VIX and GAMMA indicators with real data from Yahoo Finance
passed_tests: API /api/vxn returns real VXN data with value=27.04, regime=ELEVATED, index=NASDAQ-100, source=yahoo_finance
API /api/volatility/MNQ returns VIX, VXN and GAMMA data successfully
API /api/analyze includes real_vxn in response with complete data structure
Frontend displays VXN (REAL) panel with value, regime and change information
Frontend shows VXN - VIX spread calculation (+3.17)
VXN data fetched from Yahoo Finance using ^VXN ticker
VXN regime calculation working (ELEVATED for value 27.04)
VXN typically runs higher than VIX as expected (VXN: 27.04 vs VIX: 23.87)
All 21 backend API endpoints passing including new VXN endpoints
Frontend refresh functionality maintains VXN data display
Real-time data integration working with proper caching (5-minute cache duration)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (VXN panel fully functional, minor selector issues in test script)
